summary: User Dropdown z-index fix, Admin Denial Reasons Modal, and Verification Approve/Deny endpoints - All tests PASS. Dropdown has z-50, glassmorphism shadow, bg-white/95 and all menu items clickable. Gate section shows Approve/Deny buttons, Deny opens modal with 4 quick-select reasons + custom input. Backend approve/deny endpoints working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Made demo@test.com user admin via MongoDB for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verification system tested. The Gate section on Admin page shows pending verification requests with Approve/Deny buttons. Deny button opens a modal with quick-select reasons (Blurry, Expired, Wrong Document, Name Does Not Match) and custom text input. Backend endpoints /api/verification/admin/approve/{id} and /api/verification/admin/deny/{id} both work correctly. User dropdown has proper z-50, glassmorphism styling.

verified_features.notes: Profile, Settings, Orders, Help all visible and Profile click navigates to /profile/demouser

verified_features.feature: Admin Gate Deny button opens modal
verified_features.notes: deny-btn-{id} opens denial reasons modal, doesn't deny directly

verified_features.feature: Denial modal quick-select: Name Does Not Match
